tools.name: insight.getAddress
tools.description: Returns NEBL address object containing information on a specific address

tools.name: insight.getAddressBalance
tools.description: Returns NEBL address balance in satoshis

tools.name: insight.getAddressTotalReceived
tools.description: Returns total NEBL received by address in satoshis

tools.name: insight.getAddressTotalSent
tools.description: Returns total NEBL sent by address in satoshis

tools.name: insight.getAddressUnconfirmedBalance
tools.description: Returns NEBL address unconfirmed balance in satoshis

tools.name: insight.getAddressUtxos
tools.description: Returns information on each Unspent Transaction Output contained at an address

tools.name: insight.getBlock
tools.description: Returns blockchain data for a given block based upon the block hash

tools.name: insight.getBlockIndex
tools.description: Returns the block hash of a block at a given block index

tools.name: insight.getRawTx
tools.description: Returns raw transaction hex representing a NEBL transaction

tools.name: insight.getStatus
tools.description: Utility API for calling several blockchain node functions - getInfo, getDifficulty, getBestBlockHash, getLastBlockHash

tools.name: insight.getSync
tools.description: Returns information on the node's sync progress

tools.name: insight.getTx
tools.description: Returns NEBL transaction object representing a NEBL transaction

tools.name: insight.getTxs
tools.description: Returns all transactions by block or address

tools.name: insight.sendTx
tools.description: Broadcasts a signed raw transaction to the network. If successful returns the txid of the broadcast trasnaction.

tools.name: jsonRpc.postOperation
tools.description: Call any Neblio RPC command from the Neblio API libraries. Useful for signing transactions with a local node and other functions. Will not work from a browser due to CORS restrictions. Requires a node to be running locally at 127.0.0.1

tools.name: ntP1.broadcastTx
tools.description: Broadcasts a signed raw transaction to the network. If successful returns the txid of the broadcast trasnaction.

tools.name: ntP1.burnToken
tools.description: Builds an unsigned raw transaction that burns an NTP1 token on the Neblio blockchain.

tools.name: ntP1.getAddressInfo
tools.description: Returns both NEBL and NTP1 token UTXOs held at the given address.

tools.name: ntP1.getTokenHolders
tools.description: Returns the the the addresses holding a token and how many tokens are held

tools.name: ntP1.getTokenId
tools.description: Translates a token symbol to a tokenId if a token exists with that symbol on the network

tools.name: ntP1.getTokenMetadata
tools.description: Returns the metadata associated with a token.

tools.name: ntP1.getTokenMetadataOfUtxo
tools.description: Returns the metadata associated with a token for that specific utxo instead of the issuance transaction.

tools.name: ntP1.getTransactionInfo
tools.description: Returns detailed information regarding an NTP1 transaction.

tools.name: ntP1.issueToken
tools.description: Builds an unsigned raw transaction that issues a new NTP1 token on the Neblio blockchain.

tools.name: ntP1.sendToken
tools.description: Builds an unsigned raw transaction that sends an NTP1 token on the Neblio blockchain.

tools.name: testnetFaucet.testnetGetFaucet
tools.description: Withdraw testnet NEBL to your Neblio Testnet address. By default amount is 1500000000 or 15 NEBL and has a max of 50 NEBL. Only 2 withdrawals allowed per 24 hour period.
